title: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
summary: Cardano wallet SecondFi traced the incident to an address-level issue and secured 129 million ADA after attackers drained funds from 374 addresses.

title: CBOE debuts prediction market with S&P 500 contracts
summary: Cboe launched its first prediction market product tied to the S&P 500 index, citing a growing investor demand for binary options contracts.

title: Paramount’s $110 Billion Warner Bid on Track for EU Approval
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. is on track for European Union approval, with the firms open to offering concessions to appease concerns over film distribution flagged by the bloc’s competition chief Teresa Ribera.

title: Gold Breaks Below $4,000 as Multi-Year Rally Grinds to a Halt
summary: Gold fell below $4,000 an ounce for the first time since November, as a resurgent dollar and the prospect of higher interest rates bring bullion’s three-year bull market to a halt.

title: Morning Minute: Meta Is Building a Prediction Market
summary: Arthur Hayes put out a bull case for the CARDS token, and the Clarity Act is facing some surprising opposition from a new group.

title: DOJ Seizes Huione Infrastructure Linked to Billions in Crypto Laundering
summary: The seizure hits a cloud account that powered Huione Guarantee, a Telegram marketplace tied to billions in Southeast Asian scam proceeds.

title: Black Lake, Nuva Labs tokenize $25 million in mortgage loans on Provenance in RWA push
summary: Black Lake and Nuva Labs completed the onchain minting of $25 million in mortgage loans on Provenance Blockchain.

title: 21Shares says bitcoin’s post-halving price action ‘still looks familiar,’ but sees recovery toward $100,000 by year-end
summary: Bitcoin sits roughly 50% below its $126,000 peak in October 2025 as 21Shares points to a $100,000 base-case recovery by year-end.

title: Venezuela to reveal $240bn debt pile in world’s largest restructuring
summary: Caracas to disclose it has much more borrowing than expected after overthrow of Maduro
